name: Acme Support Agent
description: Agent-facing support toolkit for triage, escalation, and renewal interventions.

actions.title: Search knowledge base
actions.description: Search the support knowledge base with semantic matching and return concise snippets.

actions.title: Create escalation ticket
actions.description: Create an escalation ticket for incidents that need a human support lead, including severity and customer impact.
safetyNotes: Escalations are logged and visible to the support lead queue.

actions.title: Draft renewal offer
actions.description: Draft a renewal offer suggestion for at-risk accounts before routing to a human approver.

riskReason.description: Why the renewal looks at risk

safetyNotes: Draft only. Human approval required before customer send.
